package rulecoverage

func PositiveLoggerCreatedPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "logger_created_per_request"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`zap.NewProduction()` or `logrus.New()` inside handler functions"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
